title: polemonium pulcherrimum subsp. pulcherrimum
intro: Polemonium pulcherrimum subsp. pulcherrimum, commonly known as the sky pilot or sky pilot plant, is a perennial flowering plant species belonging to the family Polemoniaceae. The plant's roots have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of the plant are also believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, and its flowers and leaves are also used in traditional culinary dishes.
